run_notes: Built direct source candidates from seed facts.
Fetched direct sources and discovered second-hop links.
Turned fetched sources into citation-backed evidence.
Assembled dossier, quality report, and library entry.

This incident dossier is critically incomplete and unsuitable for presentation. The protocol remains unidentified, the loss figure of '8' lacks any denomination, and there is no technical analysis explaining the price manipulation mechanism. While the attacker address (0x9776C0ABE8aE3C9Ca958875128F1ae1D5afafCb8) and attack transaction (0xd20b3b31...) are verified on Etherscan, the dossier fails to establish what protocol was attacked, how much was truly lost, or the specific vulnerability exploited. The evidence collection includes significant noise from Sepolia testnet transactions that are irrelevant to the mainnet incident. Substantial additional investigation is required before this can be considered a complete incident report.
Projected live incident library and dossier views.
